'''Harvey Smith''' (born 16 January 2006) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

He has spent time on loan from [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] at the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

==Background==
Smith played for [[Kippax Welfare]] as a junior.<ref>[https://www.wakefieldexpress.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/wakefield-trinitys-young-star-harvey-smith-aiming-to-kick-on-in-2026-5464436 Wakefield Trinity's young star Harvey Smith aiming to kick on in 2026]</ref>

He attended [[Brigshaw High School]].<ref>[https://www.wakefieldexpress.co.uk/news/people/staff-and-students-at-brigshaw-high-school-celebrate-sixth-form-student-making-his-rugby-league-debut-4349410 Staff and students at Brigshaw High School celebrate sixth form student making his rugby league debut]</ref>

Smith made his International debut for England Academy in their away fixture in the South of France in July 2023.<ref>[https://wakefieldtrinity.com/harvey-smith-player-re-signing-2024/ Wakefield Trinity is thrilled to announce that hugely talented 18-year-old hooker Harvey Smith has signed a new deal with the club.]</ref>

==Career==
Smith made his [[Wakefield Trinity|Trinity]] debut in the [[Super League]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in September 2023.<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/66870868 Super League: Wakefield Trinity 12-56 Hull KR - Robins finish fourth to secure home play-off]</ref>

He spent time in 2025 on loan at the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[2025 RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]].<ref>[https://www.totalrl.com/seven-cards-and-a-big-brawl-in-bradford-bulls-fiery-win-at-batley-bulldogs/ Seven cards and a big brawl in Bradford Bulls' fiery win at Batley Bulldogs]</ref>

Smith signed a five year extension to his deal at Wakefield during the 2025 season.<ref>[https://www.alloutrugbyleague.co.uk/news/harvey-smith-outlines-key-strengths-1578252 Meet Wakefield Trinity's livewire hooker looking to cement top four goal]</ref><ref>[https://wakefieldtrinity.com/harvey-smith-signs-new-five-year-deal/ Harvey Smith Signs New Five-Year Deal]</ref>
